notes: Excellent scheduling logic with all priorities, deadlines, and calendar conflicts properly handled. User preferences (morning focus, 15-min buffers, max tasks/day) clearly incorporated throughout. All 6 tasks scheduled with specific time slots and realistic durations. Markdown format is well-structured with date-based sections, emoji coding for priorities, and comprehensive daily tables. Summary tables provide quick overview. Minor deduction for creating duplicate files (E3_plan.md and E3_plan_1.md are identical), suggesting slight inefficiency. Core deliverable is exceptional with clear rationale for each scheduling decision.
